name: GoBear
description: [GoBear](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1197) is a Go-based backdoor that abuses legitimate, stolen certificates for defense evasion purposes. [GoBear](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1197) is exclusively linked to [Kimsuky](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0094) operations.(Citation: S2W Tro
